name: Sunflower Shoots
shortDescription: Nutty, crunchy microgreens perfect for salads and sandwiches.
description: Our sunflower shoots offer a delightful nutty flavor with a satisfying crunch. These nutrient-dense microgreens are packed with protein, healthy fats, and essential vitamins. Perfect for adding texture and flavor to salads, sandwiches, wraps, and smoothie bowls.
nutritionalBenefits: High in protein, vitamin E, folate, and healthy fats

name: Pea Speckled
shortDescription: Sweet, tender pea shoots with distinctive speckled appearance.
description: Our Pea Speckled microgreens offer a sweet, fresh taste reminiscent of spring peas with a beautiful speckled appearance. These tender microgreens are rich in vitamins A, C, and K, plus folate and fiber. Excellent for stir-fries, salads, or as a beautiful garnish for soups and main dishes.
nutritionalBenefits: Rich in vitamins A, C, K, folate, and fiber

name: Rambo Radish
shortDescription: Spicy, peppery kick with vibrant red stems and intense flavor.
description: Add some heat to your dishes with our Rambo Radish microgreens! These beautiful microgreens feature vibrant red stems and green leaves, delivering an intensely spicy, peppery flavor that wakes up any meal. Rich in vitamin C and antioxidants.
nutritionalBenefits: High in vitamin C, antioxidants, and natural enzymes

name: Arugula Microgreens
shortDescription: Peppery, sophisticated flavor for gourmet dishes.
description: These delicate arugula microgreens pack the same peppery punch as mature arugula but with a more refined, less bitter taste. Perfect for upscale dining and gourmet preparations. Rich in calcium, iron, and vitamin K.
nutritionalBenefits: High in calcium, iron, vitamin K, and nitrates

name: Amaranth Microgreens
shortDescription: Colorful, earthy microgreens with stunning purple and green leaves.
description: Beautiful amaranth microgreens featuring vibrant purple and green leaves with a mild, earthy flavor. These nutrient-dense microgreens are packed with protein, iron, and antioxidants. Perfect for adding color and nutrition to salads, smoothie bowls, and gourmet dishes.
nutritionalBenefits: High in protein, iron, calcium, and antioxidants

name: Cilantro Microgreens
shortDescription: Fresh, citrusy herb flavor perfect for Mexican and Asian dishes.
description: Fresh cilantro microgreens with the same bright, citrusy flavor as mature cilantro but in a tender, delicate form. These aromatic microgreens are perfect for Mexican, Asian, and Mediterranean cuisines. Rich in vitamins A, C, and K.
nutritionalBenefits: Rich in vitamins A, C, K, and antioxidants

name: Kale Lacinato
shortDescription: Nutrient-dense dinosaur kale with mild, sweet flavor.
description: Lacinato kale microgreens, also known as dinosaur kale, offer a milder and sweeter flavor than regular kale. These dark green microgreens are incredibly nutrient-dense, packed with vitamins A, C, K, and powerful antioxidants. Perfect for health-conscious consumers.
nutritionalBenefits: Extremely high in vitamins A, C, K, calcium, and antioxidants

name: Parsley Microgreens
shortDescription: Fresh, clean herb flavor perfect for garnishes and cooking.
description: Delicate parsley microgreens with a fresh, clean herb flavor that's milder than mature parsley. These versatile microgreens are perfect for garnishing dishes, adding to salads, or incorporating into cooking. Rich in vitamins A, C, and iron.
nutritionalBenefits: High in vitamins A, C, iron, and folate

name: Watercress Microgreens
shortDescription: Peppery, mineral-rich microgreens with a distinctive bite.
description: Watercress microgreens deliver a distinctive peppery flavor with mineral-rich taste. These nutrient-dense microgreens are packed with vitamins and minerals, particularly high in vitamin K and nitrates. Excellent for adding a peppery kick to salads and gourmet dishes.
nutritionalBenefits: Very high in vitamin K, calcium, iron, and nitrates
